summary: The diff addresses REQ-1 by modifying the Navigation component and global CSS to fix the black background bleed above the 'Exclusive Pre-Launch' badge. The nav-transparent class was changed from a solid/opaque background to a subtle top-to-bottom gradient, and the pre-launch-badge was updated to use a solid semi-opaque background. The Navigation component now uses 'nav-transparent' instead of 'bg-transparent' for the unscrolled state. These changes appear to address all acceptance criteria for REQ-1.
